for 2024-29 block for the assets covered under this petition, as per para 15 and 16
above.

from time to time) of the respective financial year directly ...

(2) of the IT Act, 1961, defines book profit as the net profit in the Statement of Profit and
Loss prepared in accordance with Schedule-III of the Companies Act, 2013, subject to
some additions and deductions as mentioned in the IT Act, 1961.
